onboarding.slide1Desc: The smart assistant that helps you solve sudoku without giving you the answer.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Three levels of help: where to look, which technique to use, and the exact answer.

consent.title: Before you start
consent.subtitle: To continue, I declare that I have read and accept:
consent.note: You can read these documents again at any time in Settings.

home.title: Sudoku Hint
home.subtitle: Choose a variant
home.continueSubtitle: You already have a game in progress for this variant.
home.continueContinueDesc: Pick up where you left off
home.abandonSubtitle: You have a game in progress. Changing variant will lose your progress.
home.abandonConfirmDesc: The current game will be lost

given.cardDesc: Enter the numbers already present in the sudoku grid.
given.cardDesc2: You can edit them at any time by coming back to this screen.
given.restartConfirm: Do you want to clear all entered numbers?
given.errorConflicts: Found {{count}} conflicts. Check the red cells.

user.cardTitle: Enter the numbers you already solved
user.cardDesc: Add the numbers you already found on your own, then calculate the solution.
user.counterZero: Enter at least one number to proceed
user.errorConflict: Conflict found. Check the red cells.
user.errorNoSolution: No solution found. Check that all entered numbers are correct.

hint.title: Hints
hint.showSolutionConfirm: Do you want to see the complete solution? Missing numbers will appear in red.
hint.hintPlaceholder: Press "Ask for a hint" to get help

desc.l1_cell: Look at the cell in row {{row}}, column {{col}}.
desc.l2_naked: Technique: Naked Single. The cell in row {{row}}, column {{col}} has only one possible number.
desc.l2_hidden_row: Technique: Hidden Single in row. In row {{row}}, a number can only go in one cell.
desc.l2_hidden_col: Technique: Hidden Single in column. In column {{col}}, a number can only go in one cell.
desc.l2_hidden_box: Technique: Hidden Single in box. In this box, a number can only occupy one cell.
desc.l2_fallback: The cell in row {{row}}, column {{col}} is the most constrained. Analyze the candidates.
desc.l3_answer: In the cell at row {{row}}, column {{col}} insert the number {{answer}}.
